title: IL&FS Skills is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IL&FS Skills is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the IL&FS Skills family as a Subject Matter Expert in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IL&FS Skills:
IL&FS Skills is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
